subcodes.first_line: O remembrance of that noble soul! What flowed from the pen hath been noted; the joyful tidings [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یادگار آن نفس بزرگوار آنچه از قلم رقم یافته بود ملاحظه گردید خبر پرمسرت
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @stories; anecdotes, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @suffering and imprisonment
